flags.label: In-state tuition
flags.summary: In-state tuition at Furman University rose 12% between 2021 and 2024 ($53.4k → $59.8k).

flags.label: Out-of-state tuition
flags.summary: Out-of-state tuition at Furman University rose 12% between 2021 and 2024 ($53.4k → $59.8k).

flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at Furman University fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (0.5% → 0.0%).

flags.label: Private nonprofit bachelor's-predominant peer
flags.summary: 10-year earnings at Furman University are 65% above the private nonprofit bachelor's-predominant peer median ($68.6k vs $41.7k).
